summary: This email is a follow-up to the weekly sync meeting. The team is requested to review an attached proposal and submit their feedback by Friday at 3 PM. Minh is responsible for updating the timeline and sharing the revised plan with everyone. Lan will be scheduling a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday to continue the discussion.
action_items: Send feedback on the proposal by Friday 3 PM
Minh to share the revised plan
Lan to schedule a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday
